subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy detailed letter was received, yet I can answer it with naught but a drop [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل شما رسید ولی من آندریا را جز بقطره ای جواب نتوانم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
